items.title_en: Dow futures jump rise 200 points on tentative hope U.S.-Iran deal is close: Live updates
items.title_zh: 道指期货上涨 200 点，因美伊协议有望接近：实时更新
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 climbed 0.9% last week to notch its longest weekly winning streak since late 2023.
items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数上周上涨 0.9%，创下 2023 年底以来最长的单周上涨趋势。

items.title_en: UK gilt yields retreat from multi-decade highs as political drama mellows, rate hike expectations ease
items.title_zh: 随着政治局势缓和、加息预期缓和，英国国债收益率从数十年高位回落
items.desc_en: As bond markets returned from a bank holiday on Tuesday morning, the yield on the benchmark 10-year bond stood at 4.85%.
items.desc_zh: 周二上午，债券市场结束银行假期后，基准 10 年期债券收益率为 4.85%。

items.title_en: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Micron, Pershing Square, Dell, Occidental & more
items.title_zh: 以下是周二最大的分析师电话会议：Nvidia、Apple、Micron、Pershing Square、Dell、Occidental 等
items.desc_en: Here are Tuesday's biggest calls on Wall Street.
items.desc_zh: 以下是周二华尔街最重要的呼吁。

items.title_en: Four killed as school minibus collides with train in Belgium
items.title_zh: 比利时学校小巴与火车相撞 造成四人死亡
items.desc_en: Two schoolchildren, their chaperone and the minibus driver were killed in the crash, says a Belgian minister.
items.desc_zh: 比利时一位部长表示，两名小学生、他们的监护人和小巴司机在事故中丧生。

items.title_en: BP shares fall after board removes chairman Albert Manifold over 'serious’ conduct concerns
items.title_zh: 董事会因“严重”行为问题罢免董事长阿尔伯特·马尼福德后，英国石油公司股价下跌
items.desc_en: The board of British energy major BP on Tuesday announced it had unanimously decided to remove Chairman Albert Manifold with immediate effect.
items.desc_zh: 英国能源巨头英国石油公司(BP)董事会周二宣布，一致决定罢免董事长艾伯特·马尼福德(Albert Manifold)，立即生效。

items.title_en: Bill Ackman's stock is off to a great start since its debut. But analysts are leery from here
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼的股票自上市以来就取得了良好的开局。但分析师对此持怀疑态度
items.desc_en: The stock, which trades under the ticker PS, debuted alongside closed-end fund Pershing Square USA, or PSUS, on the New York Stock Exchange.
items.desc_zh: 该股票的股票代码为 PS，与封闭式基金 Pershing Square USA（PSUS）一起在纽约证券交易所上市。

items.title_en: Wells Fargo to offer mortgage incentives on 3D printed homes with Icon
items.title_zh: 富国银行将为 Icon 的 3D 打印房屋提供抵押贷款激励
items.desc_en: Wells Fargo will provide a 50 basis point lender credit to buyers of Icon homes using its mortgages.
items.desc_zh: 富国银行将向使用其抵押贷款购买 Icon 房屋的买家提供 50 个基点的贷款信贷。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Ferrari, Lear, Intuitive Machines, Micron Technology and more

items.desc_en: These are some of the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是早盘交易中涨幅最大的一些股票。

items.title_en: Eli Lilly stock edges higher as company plans nearly $4 billion in vaccine deals
items.title_zh: 礼来公司计划进行近 40 亿美元的疫苗交易，股价小幅上涨
items.desc_en: The deals are part of Eli Lilly’s effort to expand into infectious disease research and development.
items.desc_zh: 这些交易是礼来公司向传染病研究和开发领域扩张的努力的一部分。

items.title_en: Senegal's sacked PM Sonko elected parliamentary Speaker in challenge to president
items.title_zh: 塞内加尔被解职总理桑科当选议会议长挑战总统
items.desc_en: As speaker, Sonko could use his position to challenge the policies of the president, his one-time ally.
items.desc_zh: 作为议长，桑科可以利用自己的职位来挑战他曾经的盟友总统的政策。

items.title_en: ‘A very dangerous bluff’: Mark Carney warns of Brexit-like regret if Alberta leaves Canada

items.desc_en: The Canadian prime minister led the Bank of England when the U.K. left the European Union in 2020.
items.desc_zh: 2020 年英国退出欧盟时，加拿大总理领导了英格兰银行。

items.title_zh: 乌干达三人撞大象身亡
items.desc_en: Four people were also injured in the incident inside Murchison Falls National Park, officials say.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，默奇森瀑布国家公园内的事件还造成四人受伤。

items.title_en: At least 19 people taken to hospital after 'strong smell' reported at Tokyo mall
items.title_zh: 东京商场传出“强烈气味” 至少19人被送往医院
items.desc_en: Police say a man sprayed a substance at an ATM in the luxury Ginza 6 shopping centre.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，一名男子在豪华的银座 6 购物中心的自动取款机上喷洒了一种物质。

items.title_en: 'I never heard of the Strait of Hormuz before this': How one medical supply CEO is navigating the oil price shock
items.title_zh: “在此之前我从未听说过霍尔木兹海峡”：一位医疗供应首席执行官如何应对油价冲击
items.desc_en: Medical supply company Gentell sources raw materials from around the world, and the crisis at the Strait of Hormuz is causing volatility for its business.
items.desc_zh: 医疗供应公司 Gentell 从世界各地采购原材料，霍尔木兹海峡的危机正在导致其业务波动。

items.title_en: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
items.title_zh: 在债务和价格压力下，美国人陷入“根深蒂固”的财务压力
items.desc_en: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.
items.desc_zh: 通货膨胀和高债务水平继续引起许多美国人的财务焦虑。非营利组织可以帮助进行债务管理。

items.title_en: Barriers grow for international students seeking U.S. jobs: The 'American dream ... is collapsing'
items.title_zh: 国际学生寻求美国工作的障碍越来越大：“美国梦......正在崩溃”
items.desc_en: International graduates say a weak hiring market and changing immigration rules make it harder for them to achieve their American dream of working in the U.S.
items.desc_zh: 国际毕业生表示，疲软的招聘市场和不断变化的移民规则使他们更难实现在美国工作的美国梦。

items.title_zh: marpy.io
items.desc_en: AI coding platform built specifically for the Python stack
items.desc_zh: 专为 Python 堆栈构建的 AI 编码平台

items.title_zh: LikePulse
items.desc_en: See exactly where YouTube audiences react — instantly
items.desc_zh: 立即准确了解 YouTube 观众的反应

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: Willow Scribe
items.title_zh: Willow Scribe
items.desc_en: Tell Scribe what to say. It writes the rest.
items.desc_zh: 告诉抄写员要说什么。其余的都写了。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.desc_en: API for agentic multi-document processing
items.desc_zh: 用于代理多文档处理的 API

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's SpaceX postpones Starship launch
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 推迟了星际飞船的发射
items.desc_en: It comes just a day after the firm revealed plans for a record-breaking stock market debut.
items.desc_zh: 就在一天前，该公司公布了破纪录的股票上市计划。

items.title_en: Love factually: Dating start-ups promise to cut the cheats
items.title_zh: 爱如实：约会初创公司承诺减少作弊行为
items.desc_en: Frustration with fake dating profiles has spurred new dating services with different approaches.
items.desc_zh: 对虚假约会资料的失望催生了采用不同方法的新约会服务。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_en: Meta settles social media addiction case with US school district
items.title_zh: Meta 与美国学区解决社交媒体成瘾案
items.desc_en: The trial had been set as a test case for 1200 other school districts making similar claims.
items.desc_zh: 该审判已被定为其他 1200 个做出类似主张的学区的测试案例。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。

items.title_en: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
items.title_zh: SpaceX 申请 IPO 可能使埃隆·马斯克成为万亿富翁
items.desc_en: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。
